title: GammaOperatorBundle
description: Metadata for a set of assembled gamma matrices satisfying the Clifford algebra anti-commutation relations for a given spinor representation spec.

bundleId.description: Unique identifier for this gamma operator bundle

ySpaceDimension.description: Dimension n of Y, determining number of gamma matrices

chiralityOperators.description: Three distinct chirality operators. Y-chirality = X-chirality * F-chirality (up to sign). Each only exists when the corresponding subspace dimension is even. For odd dimY (e.g. toy dimY=5): yChiralityIncluded=false, but xChiralityIncluded may still be true if dimX is even.

yChiralityIncluded.description: Y-chirality (full): Gamma_chi = i^{n/2} * Gamma_1 * ... * Gamma_n. True only when ySpaceDimension is even. Decomposes spinors into two Weyl reps of dimension 2^{n/2-1}.

xChiralityIncluded.description: X-chirality (base): product of dim(X) horizontal gammas. Relates to observed 4D chirality. True when baseDimension is even.

fChiralityIncluded.description: F-chirality (fiber): product of dim(F) vertical gammas. True when fiberDimension is even.

baseDimension.description: Dimension of the base space X

fiberDimension.description: Dimension of the fiber F (= dimY - dimX)

gammaStorageRef.description: Artifact path reference for the serialized gamma matrices on disk

passed.description: Whether the Clifford algebra anti-commutation relations were satisfied

anticommutatorMaxResidual.description: Maximum residual from {Gamma_mu, Gamma_nu} = 2 g_{mu,nu} I check

chiralitySquaredResidual.description: Residual from Gamma_chi^2 = I check (null for odd dimY)

chiralityAnticommutatorResidual.description: Residual from {Gamma_chi, Gamma_mu} = 0 check (null for odd dimY)

hermitianResidual.description: Maximum deviation from Gamma_mu = Gamma_mu^dagger (for Riemannian signature)
